content.text: I'll start by diagnosing the current state of all three areas before applying fixes.

input.command:
echo "=== Team A ==="; kubectl get all -n spark-team-a
echo; echo "=== Team B ==="; kubectl get all -n spark-team-b
echo; echo "=== History ==="; kubectl get all -n spark-history
echo; echo "=== RoleBinding A ==="; kubectl get rolebinding spark-role-binding -n spark-team-a -o yaml
echo; echo "=== PVCs in spark-history ==="; kubectl get pvc -n spark-history

input.command:
kubectl get deployment spark-history-server -n spark-history -o yaml | sed -n '/volumes:/,/^status:/p'
echo "--- PVC describe ---"
kubectl describe pvc spark-history-pvc -n spark-history
echo "--- storageclass ---"
kubectl get storageclass
